company_summary: Hey Carla is an AI-powered voice assistant purpose-built for car rental operators. It plugs into existing rental management software to handle inbound calls — reservations, availability checks, modifications, and inquiries — so operators never miss a booking call and never overstaff their phones. Part of the Valsoft / Aspire Software portfolio.

brand_voice.tone: direct, ROI-focused, conversational — not overly technical about AI
favored_phrasing: your team can focus on the counter

excluded_customers.name: Bluebird Auto Rental
excluded_customers.reason: existing internal Valsoft distribution — already served via Bluebird channel

excluded_customers.reason: existing internal Valsoft distribution — already served via Thermeon channel
